scripts.vercel-build: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.dev:once: concurrently "cross-env PORT=8000 FRONTEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 KITE_REDIRECT_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173/auth/kite/callback COOKIE_SECURE=false npm run dev --prefix backend" "cross-env VITE_API_PORT=8000 VITE_DEV_PORT=5173 npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.local: npm run build && cross-env PORT=8000 FRONTEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 KITE_REDIRECT_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000/auth/kite/callback SERVE_FRONTEND=true COOKIE_SECURE=false npm run dev --prefix backend
scripts.dev:trade: concurrently "cross-env ENABLE_TRADING=true PORT=8001 FRONTEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5174 npm run dev --prefix backend" "cross-env VITE_ENABLE_TRADING=true VITE_API_PORT=8001 VITE_DEV_PORT=5174 npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
